title: BuildCraft Legacy
description: Legacy textures for newer versions of BuildCraft
body:
Legacy textures for newer versions of Buildcraft.
Contains machines, engines and some materials.

License:
- You can include this pack in modpacks, and a link to the project page is welcome.
- You can distribute modified version of this pack, but you must include a link back to the project page.
- All old Buildcraft assets used in this pack follows [Old Buildcraft License](https://github.com/BuildCraft/BuildCraft/blob/8.0.x/LICENSE).
